About Me

EdTech · learning products · responsible AI

I focus on educational technology—translating learning goals into pragmatic products alongside teaching data science at the university level. My work blends discovery and delivery: AI-assisted tooling, learner-focused UX, NLP and document intelligence where they improve outcomes, and reliable full-stack implementations from prototype to operations.

My Experience

Higher education, assessment-focused EdTech, and enterprise delivery. Highlights below — download my CV for the full picture.

Technology Strategist

{type}Dev • Jan 2020 – Jan 2026

Led enterprise-scale BA, process engineering, and delivery across Discovery Financial Services & IoDSA. Scaled a 4-to-11-person team as Scrum Master. Drove the company's first EU market expansion (EUR 840k FFG grant). Authored adopted BPMN documentation methodology.

Senior Business Analyst (Serviced)

Discovery • May 2021 – Dec 2023

Led complex enterprise initiatives (e.g., eBoarding) with heavy integration analysis, user journeys, user stories, and stakeholder alignment.

AI Platform Architect & Data Science Lecturer

Modul University of Vienna • Sept 2023 – Current

Built PUMA — a 150K-SLOC university management platform from concept to production. Redesigned courses adopted as department standards. Voted Professor of the Year 2026.

Founder & CTO

Unwritten.click • May 2026 – Current

Solo-built and shipped a monetised AI storytelling platform — LLM narrative engine, WebSocket multiplayer, in-game economy, and payments. From concept to paying customers in under 2 months.

Co‑Founder & CTO

PerspectiveMind AI • Nov 2024 – Current

Building a proctored oral assessment platform (EdTech)—React/Flask, speech and vision models, Faster Whisper, ElevenLabs, WebRTC, Socket.IO.

Senior Business Analyst (Serviced)

Discovery • Jan 2024 – Oct 2025

Authored deep functional specs and process maps (e.g., ILSA migration, Questionnaire Platform, Supplier Onboarding, Security SOPs).

AI Executive MasterClass Lecturer

TypeDev Technologies • Feb 2026 – Current

Delivering AI strategy MasterClass series to 180+ C-suite executives. Publicly recorded sessions on AI strategy, responsible deployment, and enterprise adoption.

Business & Data Analyst

Modul University of Vienna • Jul 2025 – Current

Built and operated PUMA for the institution—NextJS, IIS, OData, LM Studio (Gemma) document intelligence, role-based access, CI/CD—in support of compliant knowledge workflows.

My Projects

Selected projects spanning AI, EdTech, and full-stack delivery.

PerspectiveMind AI

perspectivemind.ai • Nov 2024 – Current

Proctored oral assessment platform — React/Flask, speech and vision models, Faster Whisper, ElevenLabs, WebRTC, Socket.IO, MongoDB.

Unwritten.click

unwrittenclick.com • May 2026 – Current

Monetised AI storytelling platform — LLM narrative engine, WebSocket multiplayer, in-game economy, and payments. From concept to paying customers in under 2 months.

Voice Command Intent Model

Hugging Face • 2025

Fine-tuned Qwen 0.5B model for voice command intent classification — published on Hugging Face for the community.

PawMatcher

pawmatcher.app • 2025

Pet adoption matching platform — connecting pets with suitable homes through data-driven compatibility scoring.

Service Offers

EdTech and learning-focused delivery—tell me about your learners, constraints, and success metrics.

Learning Sites · Portals

Course and programme sites, info architecture, Bootstrap or component libraries—readable, accessible UX for learners and faculty.

EdTech Applications

Custom learning tools: assessment workflows, dashboards, integrations—typically Python/Flask, React/Next.js, or C# where it fits existing stacks.

Data · Integrations

Backend services, OData/SQL pipelines, institutional data guardrails—the plumbing that lets EdTech scale without surprises.

Learning UX · Discovery

Learner and educator journeys, journey maps, requirements and specs from ideation through handoff—strategy aligned with instructional intent.

Recommendations

Hanno van der Merwe

Bruce was an exceptional Digital Strategist in my UX department at TypeDEV and a pivotal part of our team sucees. He is one of those rare professionals who brings academic depth, entrepreneurial insight, and practical delivery skills together in a way that genuinely elevates every project he touches. As a Digital Strategist, he played a central role in shaping one of our flagship offerings used to define application specifications for our insute tech and fintech cleints know as the TypeDEV UX-Journey. The UX Journey is a robust, repeatable framework used for discovery and definition process. His work ensured that our projects entered development with fully formed requirements — from requirements engineering all the way through user stories and detailed specifications. Thanks to Bruce’s thoroughness and systems thinking, our development teams were able to build software with almost no rework, avoiding the scope creep and unclear requirements that often plague complex digital projects. The level of clarity and alignment he consistently achieved saved clients time, money, and frustration. On top of his core strategist responsibilities, Bruce frequently supported our front-end development efforts, demonstrating impressive versatility and an eagerness to collaborate across disciplines. His ability to bridge strategy, UX, and implementation made him an invaluable asset to the team. Outside of his professional work, Bruce is also a distinguished academic, now nearing the completion of his PhD in entrepreneurship. His research and scholarly perspective enriched our internal practices, and even though he reported directly to me, I can say sincerely that I learned a great deal from him. His blend of academic rigor and hands-on strategic experience is truly unique. Bruce is insightful, dedicated, generous with his knowledge, and consistently committed to driving quality and clarity in every project. Any team would be fortunate to have him, and I recommend him wholeheartedly.

Clarissa Wölfer

Bruce has been an outstanding professor throughout my Bachelor studies. His teaching approach combines strong subject-matter expertise with a clear and engaging way of presenting complex concepts. He consistently encouraged independence and supported students in developing both academic knowledge and practical skills. Beyond the classroom, Bruce demonstrated genuine dedication to his students’ success by providing guidance, constructive feedback, and mentorship whenever needed. His passion for the field and commitment to teaching have been truly inspiring, leaving a lasting impact on my academic journey.

Samaira Hassan

I had the privilege of being taught by Liu Yi-Yu (Bruce) during my Bachelor’s in Applied Data Science, where he led courses in Fundamentals of Web Programming and Applications as well as Knowledge Extraction, Modeling, and Visualization. What stood out to me was his ability to make complex topics approachable, consistently linking theory to practical, and real-world applications. His classes were always structured yet engaging, encouraging us to think critically and apply concepts beyond the classroom. He was always approachable and willing to provide assistance, even staying long after class if something didn’t make sense. He took the time to understand where we struggled and guided us patiently, ensuring that no one was left behind. He also actively supported both classroom and personal projects, fostering a culture of curiosity and exploration. Through his mentorship, I was able to strengthen my problem-solving skills, deepen my understanding of data-driven research, and gain confidence in applying these skills to real-world challenges. Beyond technical expertise, he demonstrated genuine care for student growth and success, creating an environment where learning felt both challenging and rewarding. I am deeply grateful for his guidance and wholeheartedly recommend Liu Yi-Yu (Bruce) as an outstanding educator and mentor.

Fiona Malazogu

I had the privilege of being taught by Professor Liu and also working with him as my thesis supervisor. He has always been supportive and invested in his students success. He helped me not only improve academically but also grow more confident in my work by encouraging us to try our best at all times. During his classes, he wasn’t only focusing on the theoretical aspect but always made sure to teach us the practical applications. I’m fortunate to have worked with Professor Liu and would gladly recommend him to others.

Vilopa Patel

I had the privilege of learning from Bruce, who is not only a very nice and supportive professor but also extremely knowledgeable in coding and database technologies. His teaching style is practical and impactful, making complex concepts easy to understand. He introduced me to dashboard development, which was completely new for me at the beginning. Thanks to his techniques and clear explanations, I was able to grasp and apply skills in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Python, and database management with confidence. During my internship period, he also taught me about developing web pages and gave me the opportunity to design pages using Flask files, which further strengthened my practical knowledge. His guidance has been truly valuable in my academic journey, and I highly recommend him as an inspiring educator and mentor.

Anaïs Janik-Boender

Working with Bruce has always been an absolute pleasure. He has a real talent for making complicated data problems feel simple, and he’s always ready to jump in and help. Not only is he smart, but also culturally intelligent, which makes him great to work with within an international environment. One of my favorite things about him is his problem-solving mindset, how he is always looking for solutions and never turns down the chance to support a colleague, which—if you know you know—can be rare these days!

BERYL MALEY SHENCHU

Sir Bruce is one of the teachers that pushes us to be our best. He has been my Lecturer for 2 years and i have learnt alot from him, from how to think outside the box to how to always learn from every situation, fall, rise and failure, success. As he has once told me "Mastering something you already mastered is not education" has been a qoute that has helped me see every opportunity as a learning process. Thank you for being a great Teacher and Am grateful i met someone who impacted my life for the best.

Bahareh Heidarnezhad

I had the chance to join several of Bruce’s classes, and they were always engaging and enjoyable. He brings positive energy, explains complex topics in a simple way, and encourages hands on learning, which made the lessons very practical and effective. What I appreciated the most was that he was always supportive and approachable whenever we had questions about our projects. I truly value his professionalism and the positive learning environment he created.

Priyanka Govender

I am absolutely delighted to wholeheartedly endorse Yi Yu Liu (Bruce) based on our shared journey during my internship at TypeDEV back in 2010. Bruce's unique blend of technical prowess, creative brilliance, and exceptional leadership skills made an unforgettable mark on my experience. He fostered an environment of collaboration and innovation that left a lasting impression on me. Bruce's ability to simplify complex UX design concepts, coupled with his open dialogue and constructive feedback, not only helped me grow but also ignited a passion for user-centered design. Under Bruce's mentorship, I embarked on challenging projects that fueled my professional growth. I wholeheartedly recommend Bruce to anyone seeking a mentor and manager who embodies excellence in the field of UX design.

Chris Park

Driven by a thirst for success, Bruce's dedication and tenacity are matched only by his ability to unpack and empathise with the motives of his colleagues, clients and peers. These skills, along with his technical and business competencies, set him apart from the crowd and ensure that he thrives in challenging, uncertain situations where the beaten path is not an option. I would highly recommend seeking Bruce's counsel on any business, technical, or even personal initiative.

Kuselo Ntsaluba

One of the most driven & hard-working individuals I have ever meet. Furthermore, he is someone who has the ability to add great technological & business value to any project or organisation in need of his skill set. Personally, he is also great at time management, adapts quickly to change and is very open minded in his approach to problems.

Molefe Tlhaku

Bruce is one of the smartest and most versatile people I’ve met but what is more impressive to me is how much of a committed and hardworking individual he is. These are characteristics I not only think any organisation should seek in employment candidates but that they would be fortunate to have on board.
